purpose: Single explicit preprocessing config for rerunning Dec 3 LFP results with stable settings.
important_caveat: Bad channels are treated as confirmed for the current analysis pass per user instruction. Anatomy labels are still not assigned.

reference.reason: Reference-sensitivity analysis showed the main driven-frequency conclusion was stable, and analysis-group median is a local reference matching the 32-channel analysis groups.

anatomy_caveat: Do not label medial/lateral, CA1/DG, or anterior/posterior until probe orientation is confirmed.
